name: @sqlite-saas/cache
description: Framework-agnostic caching middleware for edge CDNs

scripts.publish:patch: npm whoami && npm run build && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:minor: npm whoami && npm run build && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:major: npm whoami && npm run build && npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm publish --access public

author: bitclaw
